name: Black Templar - Fgitz
description:
In the grim darkness of the far future, there is only war. And in this war, there is no more brutal and merciless enemy than the furry menace. The Black Templars, a group of fanatical space marines, have declared a holy crusade against these fluffy, animal-like creatures. Join the Black Templars on their quest to purge the furries with their bolters and chainswords, and restore purity to the galaxy. (or be a furry too, who cares?)

—

Tags: Fgitz, flashgitz, warhammer40k, warhammer, space marine, Astartes, marine, animation (might add more tags later when I think of some oughhh)
creator: Woolter
